name: Shoppers Stop BLACK HDFC Bank Credit Card
exclusions: grocery reward accrual capped at 1,000 points per month
milestoneBenefits: Reward Points worth Rs 2,000 per month for a purchase of Rs 50,000 or above on Shoppers Stop on weekends
additionalBenefits: Shoppers Stop voucher worth Rs 1,500 as welcome benefit on any transaction at Shoppers Stop
7% Reward Points on every Shoppers Stop purchase
2% Reward Points on every non-Shoppers Stop purchase
Complimentary Shoppers Stop Black membership worth Rs 4,500
16 domestic lounge accesses, 4 per quarter, per calendar year
8 international lounge accesses, 2 per quarter, per calendar year
Accidental air death cover worth Rs 3 crore
Emergency overseas hospitalization cover up to Rs 50 lakh
Credit liability cover up to Rs 9 lakh
Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards

selfEmployed: Annual income greater than Rs 8.4 lakh
